title: lagurus ovatus
intro: Lagurus ovatus, also known as Hare's Tail or Cotton Grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. It is native to Europe and Western Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits, including antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties. Lagurus ovatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, as well as dried and used in potpourri or crafts.
